description_long: This is a small, single-story brick house with a rectangular footprint and a simple, functional design. The exterior walls are constructed from reddish-brown bricks, giving the house a sturdy and traditional appearance. The roof is made of corrugated metal panels, sloping gently from the center to the sides, and bordered by concrete or stone trim. The front facade features a wooden door with a mesh or panel design and a single rectangular window with a wooden frame. The side and rear walls have additional windows, all similarly framed, providing natural light to the interior. The house sits on a slightly raised concrete foundation, with a small set of steps leading up to the main entrance.
description: A compact, single-story brick house with a corrugated metal roof, wooden-framed windows, and a simple front entryway with steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main wooden door, a single window, and concrete steps leading to the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a single window and the sloped metal roof, with no visible entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain brick wall and no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a window and a glimpse of the front steps, similar to the other side.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with mesh or panel design, concrete steps, no porch or decorative elements
